description: Slice S3 (FGAP-029): a read-only --plan / drift detector. From the S2 baseline, report installed-vs-catalog skew per asset (version + content_hash) and what a re-sync WOULD change; mutate nothing (survey Option C as Option B's preview; cruft-check / terraform-plan flavor). Per DEC-0010: CHANGELOG [Unreleased] + usage-only docs.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Slice S3/4 of DEC-0010 | depends on S2 (needs the baseline)
